message:
fix(failure-analytics): make Low Initial Confidence detector consistent

- Add version === 1 check to "Low Initial Confidence" pattern detector
  to match its description ("Hypothesis *started* with very low confidence")
- This makes it consistent with "High Initial Confidence" which already
  checked version === 1
- Update test to verify version check works correctly
- Add JSDoc note about StructuralPatternFailure.detector not being
  JSON-serializable
